q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: target.write_bytes(request.body) on line 141 is an irreversible filesystem write side effect

mock_guidance.target: Mock the pathlib.Path.write_bytes method on the target object
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the resolved file path (target) and the bytes payload (request.body) passed to write_bytes
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Record the arguments and return without performing actual disk I/O
notes: The path is derived from BASE_EXPORT_DIR / name where name is user-controlled via request.GET
After mocking, execution continues to the return statement which exposes the path in a JsonResponse, allowing secondary validation of the traversal
